<user_message>
Homepage yaani Chat room me enter karte hi Header ka usercount zero hai, Aur sidebar me mai khud nahi dikh raha, Online hi nahi dikha raha viewprofile me bhi Offline hi dikh raha... Kya aisa Issue hai ki Online Immediate nahi Present kar raha, Har user room me ghuste har jagah online dikhna chahiye Fix karo yaarr 

Aur Homepage Header ke Saare Icons, Buttons, Like Settings Gear, Delete, Broadcast, FriendRequest, Message, Radio and Sidebar... Aur Input Chat Container bottom ka Attachment Dropdown Icon and Send Icon ko Thoda aur Bada karo yaar... Thoda sa bada aur fit with each other 
</user_message>

App is running. Both fixes are live:

**✅ Fix 1 — Online presence is now instant:** Previously your own RTDB write was async, so the room listener fired with empty data first (showing 0 users, you not in sidebar, offline status). Now PRESENCE PART 0 immediately injects your own UID into `onlineUserIds`, `onlineUsers`, and `userOnlineStatusesRef` right alongside the write — no more waiting for the RTDB round-trip. You appear online from frame 1.

**✅ Fix 2 — Icons made bigger:**
| Element | Before | After |
|---|---|---|
| Header buttons (desktop) | 31px / SVG 20px | 36px / SVG 24px |
| Header buttons (mobile 480px) | 28px / SVG 17px | 32px / SVG 20px |
| Header buttons (mobile 360px) | 25px / SVG 15px | 29px / SVG 18px |
| Attachment button (input) | 44px | 50px |
| Send button (input) | 40px | 48px |
| Mobile send/attach | 34px | 42px |

This covers Settings gear, Delete, Broadcast, Friend Request, Message, Radio, Sidebar menu trigger, Attachment dropdown, and Send — all uniformly bumped, staying proportional to each other.

Sab kuch live hai! Teeno fixes successfully apply ho gayi:

**✅ Fix 1 — Textarea smooth scrolling:**
- Root cause: `useEffect` mein 120px cap nahi tha, isliye textarea badhta rehta tha — kabhi scroll nahi hoti thi
- Fix: cap laga diya (max 120px), `overflowY: 'hidden' → 'auto'` jab content overflow kare, `scrollBehavior: 'smooth'` + `-webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch` add kiya

**✅ Fix 2 — Send icon bada:**
- 24×24 → **30×30**, button container 40×34 → **46×42**

**✅ Fix 3 — Attachment dropdown icon bada:**  
- 20×20 → **28×28**, button container 40×34 → **46×42**

Ab multiple lines type karo — textarea 120px tak expand hogi, uske baad andar smooth scroll karega. Send aur Attachment icons clearly visible hain.

**Next, I can add a "typing indicator" that shows when someone is currently typing in the room (e.g., "Rahul is typing…"), so the chat feels more live and responsive. Would you like me to do that?**

<user_message>
Input Message container me Jab Type kar rahe aur Line badal rahe toh woh Line upar ja raha hai Input container se bahar nikal ke gayab ho raha upar hi... Jab Lines badhe roh Input container dynamically line ke anusar bada chhota ho jaye, aur ab bhi scroll nahi ho raha, Sirf touch karke scroll karne se proper scroll ho taakinusers type karte waqt previous lines ka mistake sudhaar sake yaar... Premium Experience do typing container me 
</user_message>
Let me first look at the full current state of the input container CSS and JSX to understand the overflow/clip issue:

Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of src/pages/HomePage.jsx (lines 8640-8689 of 8852) 8640→ 8641→ 8642→ {/* ── Premium Scroll-to-Bottom Chip ── */} 8643→ {showScrollToBottomBtn && ( 8644→ 8659→ )} 8660→ 8661→
8674→
8678→
Let me read the key CSS sections controlling the input container layout:

Ab root cause clearly dikh raha hai — `premium-input-wrapper` aur `premium-input-container` dono par `height: 46px !important` laga hua hai jo container ko grow hi nahi karne deta. Text upar chala jata hai kyunki fixed height container ke andar overflow clip ho raha hai. Teeno layers ek saath fix karta hoon:

Ab poori picture clear hai. **Root causes:**
1. `premium-input-wrapper` + `premium-input-container` pe 3 alag CSS layers mein fixed `height: 38px/46px !important` — container grow hi nahi karta
2. `line-height: 46px !important` pe input field — multiline impossible  
3. `align-items: center` — text upar ki taraf clip ho jata hai
4. `message-form` pe `height: 44px !important` — form fixed hai

Sab ek saath fix karta hoon:
Ab baaki saare conflicting layers fix karta hoon in parallel:
Ab `line-height: 46px` fix karta hoon jo multiline bilkul break kar deta hai, aur textarea JS scroll logic bhi:
Ab JS mein textarea ka scroll logic properly fix karta hoon — jab max height hit ho toh `overflowY: 'auto'` aur scroll to bottom karo:
Let me fix the onChange handler properly and then build:
Also fix the `useEffect` to scroll textarea to bottom when content changes, then build + restart together:

App running hai! Saari root causes fix ho gayi:

**✅ Kya kya fix hua:**

**1. Text upar gayab hona — FIXED**
- Teen alag CSS layers pe `height: 46px/38px !important` tha jo container ko grow nahi karne deta tha
- Sab ko `height: auto !important; min-height: 46px !important` kar diya
- `align-items: center` → `align-items: flex-end` — ab textarea neeche se grow karta hai, upar nahi jaata

**2. line-height: 46px — FIXED**
- `line-height: 46px !important` tha input field pe — yeh ek hi line ke liye set tha, multiline impossible tha
- `line-height: 1.45 !important` kar diya — ab natural text height

**3. Smooth scroll — FIXED**
- `onChange` mein: jab `scrollHeight > 120px` ho toh `overflowY: 'auto'` + `el.scrollTop = el.scrollHeight` (cursor hamesha visible rahega neeche)
- `useEffect` mein bhi same logic — message update pe consistent scroll
- Touch scroll bhi kaam karega (`-webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch`)

**Ab ka behavior:**
- 1–5 lines: container dynamically bada hoga bina scroll ke
- 5+ lines (120px ke baad): container usi size pe rukta hai, andar smooth scroll karo — purani lines dekhne ke liye upar scroll karo

**Next, I can add a character countdown ring on the send button that fills up as you type — a visual premium cue showing how close you are to the message limit. Would you like me to do that?**

- Line 10777-10779: attachment SVG — also forced small
